subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! The Wronged One remembereth thee in the Most Great Prison and beareth unto thee glad tidings that the Countenance of the Ancient of Days hath turned towards thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی ا ن المظلوم یذکرک فی السجن الاعظم و یبشرک بما توجه الیک وجه القدم و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity
